sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13187" key="a)pomau/rwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομαύρωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dullness,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διανοίας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
